<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check ASCII around the player and the purple wall
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== Rows 45-52, cols 15-35 ===")
for r in range(45, 53):
    print(f"{r}: {ascii_lines[r][15:36]}")

# Check player position
print("\n=== White pixels ===")
for r, line in enumerate(ascii_lines):
    for c, ch in enumerate(line):
        if ch == 'W' and r < 63:
            print(f"  W at [{r}, {c}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
